search.query: | inputlookup interface_groups_lookup | search exp_ip=* if_name=* if_group=*

`netflow_search_rule_20067` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host transport protocol_id input_snmp output_snmp flow_smpl_id sum_by_exp _time | `sampling(sum_packets_in)`

| eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(sum_packets_in) as sum_packets_in by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | lookup `is_local_lookup` interface_groups_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip if_name AS snmp_name OUTPUT if_group | where if_group != "unknown" | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmountBoth sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by if_group exp_ip nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | eval pct = TrafficAmountBoth*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval TrafficAmountBoth=TrafficAmountBoth/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmountBoth)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat if_group "/" exp_ip_name if_group_exp | table if_group_exp "Total Traffic MB" pct "Total Packets" | rename if_group_exp as "Interface Group/Device" | rename pct as "% of Total"

| eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmountBoth sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmountBoth)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | lookup `is_local_lookup` interface_groups_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip if_name AS snmp_name OUTPUT if_group | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat if_group "/" exp_ip_name if_group_exp | where if_group_exp == "$ifGroup$" | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | eval pct = TrafficAmountBoth*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | eval TrafficSpeedBoth=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountBoth=TrafficAmountBoth/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval percOfUsageBoth = round(TrafficSpeedBoth/(snmp_speed)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsageBoth TrafficSpeedBoth | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps Both, TrafficSpeedBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps Both, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table exp_snmp "Max Mbps Both" "Average Mbps Both" percOfUsageBoth TrafficLine pct "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename exp_snmp as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsageBoth as "% of Usage Both" | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

| `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip Direction _time sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by exp_ip Direction sum_by_exp | eval TrafficSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed = TrafficSpeed/1000000 | eval Max = Max/1000000 | eval Min = Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, Max, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps, Min, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mpbs, StDev, 2)` | table Direction "Max Mbps" "Min Mbps" "Standard Deviation Mpbs" "Average Mbps" TrafficLine pct "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

| `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by Direction,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by src_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, l_dest_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by dest_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | fillnull value="" transport | `conversation_basesearch(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range and/or there is no interface-groups.csv lookup file and/or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module "10067: Top Traffic Monitor" (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO "Network Traffic and Devices Monitor" Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
This dashboard requires interface-groups.csv lookup file.
Please create interface-groups.csv lookup file, where:

tr.td: is the exporter IP address of the device
is the name of the interface (received from SNMP polling)
is the name of the group where the interface belongs

html.pre: nfo_hostname,exp_ip,if_name,if_group localhost.localdom,10.10.10.2,Fa0/0,Group A localhost.localdom,10.10.10.2,Fa0/1,Group A localhost.localdom,10.10.10.3,Gi0/1,Group B
